nuggets.headline: pete rango's collaboration with mavi taylor on 'say it'
nuggets.text: While you're diving into "Oms at Play," it's worth noting Pete Rango's collaborative spirit. He teamed up with artist Mavi Taylor for the single "Say it," released in 2022. This partnership showcases Rango's versatility and his ability to engage with other talents in crafting compelling tracks.

nuggets.headline: pete rango's richmond, virginia roots and genre fusion
nuggets.text: Pete Rango's unique sound, which artfully blends pop, indie pop, and even dancehall, is rooted in his origins as an artist from Richmond, Virginia. He's carved out a distinct space for himself by fusing diverse musical genres, creating memorable hooks and thoughtful lyrics that resonate deeply with listeners. This approach allows him to consistently deliver music that is both genuine and alluring.

source.title: Pete Rango - Songs, Events and Music Stats | Viberate.com
source.quoteSnippet: Pete Rango is an accomplished pop artist from Richmond, Virginia, who has made a name for himself in the music business with his alluring fusion of pop and indie pop.

nuggets.headline: discover richmond's indie pop scene with kenneka cook
nuggets.text: If Pete Rango's Richmond-born indie pop sound has caught your ear, you might want to explore fellow Richmond artist Kenneka Cook. Cook is part of the vibrant 'RVA Indie' scene, known for its blend of indie rock, punk, and folk, often with a DIY ethos. Her work, sometimes featuring collaborations with Infinitefreefall, offers another facet of the rich musical landscape emerging from Virginia's capital city.

source.title: A collaborative Richmond Spotify playlist - RICtoday
source.quoteSnippet: “Don't Ask Me” by Kenneka Cook + Infinitefreefall | Beat-driven sonics + melodic jazz.

artistSummary: Pete Rango is an accomplished pop artist hailing from Richmond, Virginia, known for his captivating blend of pop and indie pop, infused with elements of dancehall. He has garnered a global audience with his infectious melodies and heartfelt lyrics, consistently pushing creative boundaries with each release.
